zh.lifeSummary: 當William Quartermain於大約1260年出生在英國英格蘭奧可福爾諾斯 韋斯頓時，他的父親William Quartermain32歲，母親Agnes7歲。他於大約1309年與Maude在英國英格蘭奧可福爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1315年在他的家鄉享年57歲。

nameMeanings.name: Quartermain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Quarterman
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Germaine, Marcel, Pascal.

English (Oxfordshire and Surrey): nickname from Anglo-Norman French quatre mayns, quatre mans ‘four hands’, which has been taken to imply ‘mail-fisted’ but was perhaps used of a skilled craftsman or a dextrous juggler or conjuror.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Quartermain was born about 1260, in North Weston, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Quartermain, was 32 and his mother, Agnes, was 7. He married Maude about 1309, in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died about 1315, in his hometown, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Quartermain est né environ 1260, à North Weston, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Quartermain, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Agnes, avait 7 ans. Il a épousé Maude environ 1309, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1315, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 57 ans.

Er hat um 1309 in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom Maude geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1315 im Alter von 57 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Quartermain è nato il circa 1260 nel North Weston, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Quartermain, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Agnes, aveva 7 anni. Lui sposato Maude circa 1309, nel Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1315, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Quartermainが約1260年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアノース ウエストンで生まれた時，父William Quartermainは32歳，母Agnesは7歳であった。約1309年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアでMaudeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1315年に故郷で57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Quartermain(이)가 대략 1260년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 노르스 웨스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Quartermain(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes(은)는 7세였다. 그는 대략 1309년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르에서 Maude(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1315년 그의 고향에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Maude aproximadamente 1309, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Quartermain родился около 1260 г. в местности норт вестон, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Quartermain было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes, 7. Он женился на женщине по имени Maude около 1309 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1315 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 57 лет.
